title: How to Protect Yourself from Fraud in WhatsApp & Instagram Selling
subtitle: Real stories, real risks — and how EscaraPay keeps your money safe
metaDescription: Learn how to protect yourself from WhatsApp and Instagram selling fraud. Discover the 5 most common scams and how EscaraPay's token system keeps your money safe.

content.text: In India's booming social commerce space, millions of sellers use WhatsApp and Instagram to run their businesses. But with opportunity comes risk — fraud, fake payments, and disputes are at an all-time high. This guide will help you understand the threats and protect yourself.

content.caption: Social commerce sellers face unique fraud risks every day

items.title: Fake Payment Screenshots
items.desc: Buyers send edited UPI/NEFT screenshots claiming they've paid. The money never arrives.

items.title: Chargeback Fraud
items.desc: After receiving the product, buyers dispute the payment with their bank, getting a refund while keeping the goods.

items.title: Return Fraud
items.desc: Buyer claims the item is defective, returns a different or damaged item, and demands a full refund.

items.title: Disappearing Buyers
items.desc: After negotiating and agreeing on a deal, the buyer simply stops responding once they get the product.

items.title: Fake Seller Scam
items.desc: Sellers collect advance payments from multiple buyers and disappear without shipping anything.

content.caption: Token-based payment protection ensures both parties are safe

content.text: EscaraPay uses a token-based payment protection system. The buyer pays a token (10–30% of the order value) through our secure Cashfree-powered gateway. The funds are held safely — neither the buyer nor seller can access them. After the seller dispatches and the buyer confirms receipt, the payment is released. If there's a dispute, our team reviews evidence from both parties and makes a fair decision.
💡 Pro Tip: Always use EscaraPay for orders above ₹500. For smaller amounts, the peace of mind is worth every rupee.

items: Always use a verified payment protection platform
Never accept payment screenshots as proof of payment
Keep delivery tracking numbers for all shipments
Document the product condition before shipping
Use EscaraPay's one-click buyer confirmation link
